'''Riknak''' was a [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] [[Saboteur/Legends|saboteur]] working for [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] who was [[Bounty/Legends|wanted]] dead by [[Hurleydo Travels]] for hijacking tourist [[Speeder/Legends|speeders]] (and their occupants) employed by the agency. His bounty of 1,500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] dead was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Behind the scenes==
Riknak appeared in the [[2002]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]''. He is the final secondary bounty of the level ''Gardulla's Palace'' (and the final secondary bounty in the entire game overall). In [[2012]], the incarnation of ''[[Star Wars Insider]]''{{'s}} [[Rogues Gallery (department)|Rogues Gallery]] from [[Star Wars Insider 131|Issue 131]], "An Audience of Aliens," identified individuals in Watto's viewing box from the [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] film ([[1999]]). The article [[Retroactive continuity|established retroactively]] that Riknak was among them.<ref name="Insider">{{InsiderCite|131|Rogues Gallery|Rogues Gallery: An Audience of Aliens}}</ref>
